title: Get Up Jean
lore: NuJean's debut title track — written for the first warm-up lap around a roller rink before school, when the jeans still smell like detergent.
artistPersona: Five-member Y2K k-pop girl group — every comeback fits like fresh denim, every hook sounds like a text you meant to send at midnight but sent at noon.
albumConcept: NuJean's denim-bright debut — roller-rink mornings, bunny-mascot optimism, hooks that fit before the belt does.
